chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Qarin

text: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن قارن فقد رويته عن حمزة بن محمّد العلويّ- رحمه اللّه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن الحسن بن قارن‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Qarin has been transmitted by me from Hamzah ibn Muhammad Al-Alawi - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Hasan ibn Qarin.
